name: 1Password
description: Monitor 1Password audit events, vault access, and sign-in activity for secrets management compliance. Requires a 1Password Business plan.

config.setupInstructions:
Requires: 1Password Business plan (not available on Teams or Teams Starter Pack).

1. Sign in to 1Password.com as an owner or admin
2. Go to Integrations → Events Reporting
3. Click New Integration → select Other
4. Enable scopes: Sign-in attempts, Item usages, Audit events
5. Copy the generated token
6. Enter your region: com (US), eu (Europe), or ca (Canada)
7. Paste the token below

Note: Do NOT use a Service Account token — Events Reporting tokens are required.

credentialFields.label: Events API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create an Events Reporting integration at 1Password.com → Integrations → Events Reporting. Enable scopes: Sign-in attempts, Item usages, Audit events.

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Enter your account region: com (US), eu (Europe), or ca (Canada)

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies 1Password audit logging is enabled and the Events API token has access to audit events

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews recent 1Password sign-in attempts for unauthorized access and suspicious activity
